programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Full Frame
programme.desc: Full Frame enriches the lives of viewers through animated discussion of film, arts and culture, and social trends etc impacting a diverse global audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Hitler e la sua cerchia ristretta
programme.desc: Per decenni gli storici hanno sostenuto che Hitler non avesse vita privata e fosse un essere socialmente disturbato. In uno studio innovativo, Heike Görtemaker ha rivelato che aveva relazioni e amicizie. Il suo circolo ristretto era il suo rifugio, basato su lealtà assoluta fino alla fine nel 1945.

programme.title: Hitler e la sua cerchia ristretta
programme.desc: Per decenni gli storici hanno sostenuto che Hitler non avesse vita privata e fosse un essere socialmente disturbato. In uno studio innovativo, Heike Görtemaker ha rivelato che aveva relazioni e amicizie. Il suo circolo ristretto era il suo rifugio, basato su lealtà assoluta fino alla fine nel 1945.

programme.title: Il Terzo Reich a colori
programme.desc: Archivi privati rivelano inediti filmati a colori del Terzo Reich: Normandia, feste, atrocità della Wehrmacht e vita di Hitler, offrendo un'opprimente realtà del regime nazista.

programme.title: Il Terzo Reich a colori
programme.desc: Archivi privati rivelano inediti filmati a colori del Terzo Reich: Normandia, feste, atrocità della Wehrmacht e vita di Hitler, offrendo un'opprimente realtà del regime nazista.

programme.title: Il Terzo Reich a Colori
programme.desc: Archivi privati rivelano inediti filmati a colori del Terzo Reich: Normandia, feste, atrocità della Wehrmacht e vita di Hitler, offrendo un'opprimente realtà del regime nazista.

programme.title: Il Cacciatore di Nazisti - Anton Freud e l'Operazione Haystack
programme.desc: Nell’inverno del 1945/46, un gruppo di uomini in jeep e Harley attraversa la Germania settentrionale a caccia di criminali nazisti. Si tratta di membri dell’Unità Investigativa sui Crimini di Guerra, nome in codice “Operazione haystack”, e tra loro c’è il maggiore Anton Walter Freud, il nipote di Sigmund Freud. Anton è rientrato in Germania appena finita la guerra e, come ufficiale dei servizi segreti britannici, sta cercando di rintracciare nella zona di occupazione britannica i nazisti ricercati: assassini in uniforme, brutali scagnozzi delle SS e medici spietati che conducevano esperimenti su bambini sotto gli ordini di Josef Mengele.

programme.title: La televisione sotto la svastica
programme.desc: Il documentario svela la nascita della televisione in Germania nazista, antecedente agli anni ’50 americani. Filmati inediti mostrano programmi, eventi e interviste dal Terzo Reich, rivelando una propaganda estetica e ideologica diversa da quella conosciuta, con immagini straordinarie.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy
programme.desc: Reflecting on Diana's legacy, this show delves into what Princess Diana left behind after her sudden passing - the impression she left on her children, the royal family, and the people who loved her. The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E04 - Elizabeth At 80 Continuity And Change
programme.desc: Thanks to the Queen’s dedication, Britain found a way to move past its empire days and create a successful new identity, surprising many experts. This is the story of an amazing woman and her amazing life.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E01 - To Be Alive
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer check out video entries to pick a lucky pair to come with them to Alaska. The hunters meet each other at the airport for the first time. Casey and Kaid get Dropped off, while Chris and the rest face delays at the hangar.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E02 - Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: The weather in Alaska eases up just enough for Chris and Kaid to make it to their destination and catch some food. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. have already set up camp, gearing up for moose season. The brothers need to get used to the idea of being dropped off separately for the first time.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E07 - Operation Summer Recreation
programme.desc: We’re close to Seeley Lake, Montana, where the wardens from Region 2 have their hands full with the summer visitors.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E05 - From Inquisitive Bears to Caribou
programme.desc: A curious bear messes with Charlie Summerville's building plans; Pat Harvie shows his wife Connie how to fish for salmon like they do in the Aleutians, and Merrick Jackinsky goes looking for caribou.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E05 - Bond-ing with Larry
programme.desc: Who is the greatest international action hero of all time, Terry Schappert? No. Terry and Larry get to test some scenes from James Bond films and other great action heroes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E06 - Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western. Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy
programme.desc: Reflecting on Diana's legacy, this show delves into what Princess Diana left behind after her sudden passing - the impression she left on her children, the royal family, and the people who loved her. The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.desc: Thanks to the Queen’s dedication, Britain found a way to move past its empire days and create a successful new identity, surprising many experts. This is the story of an amazing woman and her amazing life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy

The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E05 - Bond-ing with Larry
programme.desc: Who is the greatest international action hero of all time, Terry Schappert? No. Terry and Larry get to test some scenes from James Bond films and other great action heroes.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E38 - HM The Queen A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: The most notable woman in modern times has to be our Late Queen, Elizabeth II. She ruled for 70 years, the longest reign in British history. Once a princess who wasn't supposed to be queen, Elizabeth II led the country to thrive after World War II and became a steady presence in our changing world. In a thousand years of British monarchy, Elizabeth II is likely one of the most outstanding monarchs ever.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E03 - Predators Prowl
programme.desc: Chris and Kaid were getting their rafts set up, while Casey and R.L. started looking around for black bears and moose. Just then, Chris and Kaid noticed a predator making its way towards their campsite.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E04 - Cloudy Days
programme.desc: It's the second day of hunting season, and Chris and Kaid are still on the lookout for big game. They head downstream to see if they can find a better spot to catch some fish. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. feast on salmon, getting some much-needed protein. Huge storm clouds are pouring over Alaska.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E08 - Operation Rocky Mountain Front
programme.desc: During hunting season, game wardens stay on their toes by catching poachers with an elk decoy, tracking down trespassers, and checking hunting tags.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville disappears while trying to transport building supplies by boat. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie Harvie have to handle a flood of volcano experts showing up at the most isolated ranch in America.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E07 - Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Don't mess with organized crime. The dynamic duo tackle scenes from the Mexico cartel series Queen of the South, but take a pit stop at the rest room to test a scene from The Foreigner with Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E08 - Terry's Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone. Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E05 - Soaked Spirits
programme.desc: R.L. shares with Casey about the tough times that helped him understand why 'Be Alive' matters so much. Chris and Kaid are stuck in the tent because of the harsh Alaskan weather. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. manage to find some food.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E06 - Bearing Down
programme.desc: As they were having dinner, Casey noticed a bear wandering on the hill. Both he and R.L. sprinted through the rain, trying to get closer. Meanwhile, Chris was getting fed up with staying in the tent.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E09 - Operation Check Point
programme.desc: Working to safeguard our cherished natural resources in some of the nation's most hidden areas means there's always something interesting happening at work.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E07 - Isolation
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville is in desperate need of a miracle to get his wilderness lodge ready for the guests who have already booked. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie take a flight to keep an eye on the 10,000 semi-wild cattle.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E01 - Wardens Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Wardens: Case Files offers a glimpse into the remarkable stories of seasoned wildlife officers. It will transport viewers into the heart of the action, immersing them in the thrill of the chase and the satisfaction of justice served.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E02 - Moose is Loose and Lost Coast
programme.desc: A surprise guest shows up at the elementary school, giving everyone quite a scare. Meanwhile, a sneaky Angler is on the prowl, putting a twist on "catch and release." It's up to the Game Wardens to stop him.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E05 - Soaked Spirits
programme.desc: R.L. shares with Casey about the tough times that helped him understand why 'Be Alive' matters so much. Chris and Kaid are stuck in the tent because of the harsh Alaskan weather. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. manage to find some food.

programme.title: Dropped - S04:E06 - Bearing Down
programme.desc: As they were having dinner, Casey noticed a bear wandering on the hill. Both he and R.L. sprinted through the rain, trying to get closer. Meanwhile, Chris was getting fed up with staying in the tent.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E09 - Operation Check Point
programme.desc: Working to safeguard our cherished natural resources in some of the nation's most hidden areas means there's always something interesting happening at work.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E07 - Isolation
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville is in desperate need of a miracle to get his wilderness lodge ready for the guests who have already booked. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie take a flight to keep an eye on the 10,000 semi-wild cattle.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E01 - Wardens Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Wardens: Case Files offers a glimpse into the remarkable stories of seasoned wildlife officers. It will transport viewers into the heart of the action, immersing them in the thrill of the chase and the satisfaction of justice served.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E02 - Moose is Loose and Lost Coast
programme.desc: A surprise guest shows up at the elementary school, giving everyone quite a scare. Meanwhile, a sneaky Angler is on the prowl, putting a twist on "catch and release." It's up to the Game Wardens to stop him.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In this episode we show some of the most extreme winter weather ever caught on camera.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.desc: Brace yourself for unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning shows, and glass shattering hail storms!

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: I medici non sanno perché il giovane scienziato sia gravemente malato. Quando i test rivelano finalmente la causa, è troppo tardi per salvarlo. La polizia spera che l'analisi di laboratorio dei suoi capelli conduca all'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria scomparve senza lasciare traccia, i compagni di studi si preoccuparono.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, Rebecca Barney e il suo futuro ex marito Fred furono trovati colpiti a morte nella loro casa di Tulsa, in Oklahoma, che era stata data alle fiamme.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Negli anni '90, i media soprannominarono Richard Rogers il "Killer dell'Ultima Chiamata" perché prendeva di mira nei locali gay uomini che erano evidentemente ubriachi.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando il cancelliere Peter Porco non si presenta al lavoro nel novembre 2004, un funzionario del tribunale è richiesto a casa della famiglia Porco a Bethlehem, New York.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nella notte di Halloween del 2004, Adriane Insogna e Leslie Mazzara furono brutalmente uccise nella loro casa di Napa, in California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Tiffany Rowell e tre dei suoi amici furono brutalmente assassinati nel loro ricco quartiere di Clear Lake, in Texas, e la scena del crimine fornì poche prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'immobiliarista del Colorado Alan Helmick fu trovato colpito a morte a casa della moglie Miriam, che diventò quindi la principale sospettata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen ricevette e-mail minacciose e poi scomparve. Il monitoraggio della fonte delle e-mail portò la polizia a casa di Daphne Wright, dove credono sia stato commesso un omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una donna fu brutalmente uccisa nella sua casa e gli unici testimoni del delitto erano i cani di famiglia. Un esperto di comportamento canino era certo che il killer conoscesse sia la vittima che gli animali e deciso a capire cosa videro i cani.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime, leaving investigators feeling confused.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un triangolo amoroso diventato fatale sembra chiuso fino a quando la tecnologia non ne racconta la storia.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Dopo che due operai sono stati uccisi in un cantiere, la polizia si concentra su un indizio importante.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane famiglia viene uccisa, i detective devono decifrare le minacce scritte sulla scena del crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A seguito della morte improvvisa di una donna attenta alla salute, iniziano le indagini sulle possibili cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane madre viene trovata assassinata nella sua casa. Ci sono inizialmente due sospettati con un movente, ma grazie un colloquio insolito e le riprese della telecamera di sicurezza, gli investigatori prendono una nuova terrificante direzione.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una donna di 20 anni va a fare un giro in bicicletta e non torna più. Gli anni passano senza trovare prove o indizi, fino a quando la nuova tecnologia non risolve il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una piccola comunità è scioccata quando una donna viene colpita e uccisa in una chiesa. La polizia ha poche prove e nessun sospetto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, la studentessa di infermieristica Tamika Huston sparì dalla sua casa a Spartanburg, Sud Carolina. Una soffiata portò gli investigatori alla sua macchina e trovarono chiavi di casa ignote che avrebbero potuto aiutare a risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Negli anni '90, i media soprannominarono Richard Rogers il "Killer dell'Ultima Chiamata" perché prendeva di mira nei locali gay uomini che erano evidentemente ubriachi.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il miglioramento digitale del video di sicurezza rivela che ciò che sembra un incontro casuale è in realtà un sequestro che porta all'omicidio. Gli inquirenti sospettano che i crimini non siano casuali e temono che vi sia un serial killer in libertà.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, l'adolescente Tara Munsey scompare dopo un turno di lavoro in un ristorante della Virginia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, la politica del Nevada Kathy Augustine morì misteriosamente in un'accanita campagna di rielezione e il medico legale non riuscì né ad individuare la causa di morte né a spiegare le piccole ferite da puntura scoperte durante l'autopsia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un'insegnante devota e rispettata scomparve, la polizia dovette determinare se fosse andata in vacanza senza dirlo a nessuno o se fosse stata vittima di un crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna venne violentata, pugnalata più volte e lasciata morire. Quando qualcuno che coincideva con la descrizione si è praticamente costituito, la polizia era sicura di avere il suo uomo... finché le prove del DNA non hanno dimostrato il contrario.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Kathy Lorick fu assassinata su una pista da jogging di Concord, in California, in pieno giorno mentre parlava con suo marito al cellulare.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria scomparve senza lasciare traccia, i compagni di studi si preoccuparono.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando il cancelliere Peter Porco non si presenta al lavoro nel novembre 2004, un funzionario del tribunale è richiesto a casa della famiglia Porco a Bethlehem, New York.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un giovane vigile del fuoco morì per quella che sembrava essere una grave malattia cardiaca non diagnosticata, la sua famiglia e i suoi amici erano devastati ma non avevano prove del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, il capocantiere Darrell North fu trovato morto nel suo rimorchio a Ft. Vale, Texas. Quando gli inquirenti arrivarono, scoprirono che era stato accoltellato 46 volte, rivelando un rapporto personale tra la vittima e l'aggressore.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima è stata pugnalata più di trenta volte e la scena del crimine è piena del suo sangue. Vicino alla sua testa, la polizia scopre un caratteristico bottone con pezzi di filo ancora attaccati.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, la casa mobile di Effie e Michael Ratley prese fuoco e Michael salvò la moglie e il figlio neonato.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I pazienti dell'ospedale di Clarksburg, West Virginia, continuano a morire con bassi livelli di glicemia.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I detective sono decisi a fare tutto il possibile per catturare uno stupratore e assassino. Usano una prova cruciale: un'impronta del palmo.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una donna viene uccisa in un parcheggio affollato in pieno giorno. Sembra un colpo da professionisti, ma le prove rivelano un piano elaborato.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: In una storia di rapimenti, riscatti e omicidi a Los Angeles, due scienziati in pensione usano l'attrezzatura sonar per localizzare le vittime sul fondo di un bacino idrico.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Il weekend del 4 luglio finisce in tragedia per una famiglia californiana. Per catturare l'assassino, i detective utilizzano una tecnica non ortodossa, analizzando frammenti di cimici, per poter mettere l'assassino dietro le sbarre.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una famiglia piange l'inaspettata morte dell'amata nonna a Natale. La polizia locale assicura a tutti che si è trattato di un tragico incidente e non di un delitto. Ma alcune cose sulla scena non tornano.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Otto giorni dalla scomparsa, il corpo seminudo di una diciottenne viene trovato galleggiare in un fiume.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane madre in salute muore misteriosamente dopo un piccolo incidente stradale, dando luogo a un'indagine sulla causa della sua morte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Judy Southern tornò a casa dal lavoro e fu colpita da un uomo armato che aspettava all'interno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La videosorveglianza in un casinò seguì i movimenti di una giovane fino a poco prima della sua scomparsa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane e attraente parrucchiera fu violentata e uccisa nel suo salone di bellezza. Le prove sul luogo del delitto non corrispondevano a nessuno dei sospettati e, dopo l'indagine iniziale, il caso rimase irrisolto per dieci anni.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1989, i cadaveri di Joan Rogers e delle due figlie adolescenti furono trovati a galleggiare a Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un dottorando dell'Università Statale del Michigan scomparve e venne creduto morto. Con l'aiuto di un professore di scienze geologiche, la polizia sperava di trovare del "marcio" sul suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, in Illinois i soccorsi giunsero in un incendio in un box e videro un uomo compresso sotto un camion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1996, Gayle Isleib, 54 anni, subì un agguato nel vialetto a Manchester, Connecticut, e fu colpita a morte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La mattina prima di Natale, una studentessa universitaria fu rapita dal parcheggio del suo appartamento.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1999, Susan Fassett fu freddata mentre lasciava le prove del coro della chiesa a Poughkeepsie, New York. Il marito Jeff diventò il primo sospettato finché non lo scagionò la polizia, che sospettava di Fred Andros, con cui Susan aveva una storia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In poco più di un mese due donne che vivevano nello stesso complesso residenziale furono brutalmente uccise. Le analogie delle scene del crimine portarono la polizia a pensare si trattasse di un serial killer che covava un forte odio verso le donne.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1969, l'operatrice telefonica venticinquenne Diane Maxwell venne stuprata e uccisa. Suo fratello promise che avrebbe scoperto il responsabile e assicurato l'assassino alla giustizia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In un tragico scherzo del destino, pochi giorni dopo che la donna vendette casa e si traslocò in un umile caravan, un incendio le tolse sia il caravan che la vita. Ma l'autopsia dimostrò che non fu un incidente.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 12 maggio 1994, Crystal Perry fu brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa a Bridgton, nel Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32 anni, fu dichiarato colpevole di omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il corpo di una giovane attraente fu trovato a un miglio dalla sua auto abbandonata. La polizia si allarmò particolarmente quando si rese conto che la vittima era venuta da loro per aiuto solo due settimane prima dopo un evento di rabbia al volante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane donna frequenta le funzioni religiose serali... poi scompare. Quando la sua auto abbandonata viene ritrovata, il serbatoio è vuoto e manca una tanica di benzina che teneva nel bagagliaio per le emergenze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: James Kenneth Elmen Jr. rapì Julie Estes, allora 21enne, dal minimarket di Southside dove lavorava nel 1985. La violentò e la uccise. Il suo corpo fu ritrovato il giorno dopo, ma l'omicidio rimase irrisolto fino al 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alla vigilia di Natale del 2005, il corpo di un uomo nero viene trovato bruciato vicino a Baltimora. È poi identificato come Wesley Person, 26enne. I tipici materiali edili anni '30 trovati vicino al corpo sono un ruolo chiave per risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un giovane vigile del fuoco morì per quella che sembrava essere una grave malattia cardiaca non diagnosticata, la sua famiglia e i suoi amici erano devastati ma non avevano prove del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2005, David Castor subì una morte lenta e straziante nell'arco di giorni. Sua moglie Stacey sosteneva che si trattasse di suicidio, anche se era stato eseguito con l'antigelo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Jason MacLennan tornò a casa e trovò il corpo di suo padre Ken disteso in una pozza di sangue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quanto può essere sfortunato un uomo? Sua moglie si è tolta la vita e la sua fidanzata del college si uccise allo stesso modo quattordici anni prima. Gli investigatori dovevano stabilire se si trattasse solo di una strana coincidenza o di un delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1986, Gary Dale Larson fu pugnalato a morte nella sua casa a Edmond, in Oklahoma, e poi l'assassino violentò la fidanzata di Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, Shamaia Smith scomparve dallo strip club in cui lavorava a East Hartford, CT. La polizia indagò su vari clienti dello strip club, ma si concentrò sull'uomo d'affari locale Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1995, la cameriera di Palm Beach Denise O'Neill venne rapita e uccisa. Il suo vicino Luis Caballero destò sospetti per il suo strano comportamento nei confronti delle troupe televisive che riprendevano il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un vicedirettore di una steakhouse della Florida viene pugnalato a morte. Sembra essere una rapina andata male, ma un'impronta insanguinata rivela che conosceva il suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La scena del delitto era piuttosto violenta: marito e moglie erano stati colpiti a morte in camera da letto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Di solito è facile determinare come un criminale è entrato sulla scena del crimine... ma non in questo caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2002, l'impresario funebre Lonnie Turner Sr. fu trovato colpito a morte. Il figlio Lonnie Jr. diventò il primo sospettato, specie dopo che si scoprì che l'omicidio venne commesso con la sua pistola. Tuttavia, aveva un alibi per l'ora del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: I medici non sanno perché il giovane scienziato sia gravemente malato. Quando i test rivelano finalmente la causa, è troppo tardi per salvarlo. La polizia spera che l'analisi di laboratorio dei suoi capelli conduca all'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1996, la polizia di Virginia Beach arrivò nell'appartamento di Makdessi e trovò Elise Makdessi e il suo amante Quincy Brown morti.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il miglioramento digitale del video di sicurezza rivela che ciò che sembra un incontro casuale è in realtà un sequestro che porta all'omicidio. Gli inquirenti sospettano che i crimini non siano casuali e temono che vi sia un serial killer in libertà.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Il dolce sale
programme.desc: Stefano Laghi, Sebastiano Caridi e Luca Montersino. Il mondo della pasticceria si incontra in cucina per dare vita a ricette di pasticceria dolce e salata.

programme.title: La scelta di Sarah S.3
programme.desc: Sarah Cicolini ritorna in Abruzzo alla ricerca dei prodotti della sua terra, una terra ricca di paesaggi struggenti, antiche tradizioni e prodotti eccellenti.

programme.title: Fuoco Piemonte
programme.desc: Razza piemontese - Il viaggio di Max e il suo Fuoco continua nella selvaggia Valchiusella. Nella natura incontaminata della valle Max incontra i produttori e i prodotti più autentici per realizzare le sue ricette.

programme.title: Giorgione a grande richiesta
programme.desc: Le ricette dei Giorgione su richiesta. Lasagne, parmigiana, carbonara o amatriciana. Tutte le ricette richieste dai suoi fans.

programme.title: Giorgione e Vito con i suoi
programme.desc: Charlott - gnocchi e zucchine - Un incontro fuori dal comune, Vito in compagnia dei ''suoi'' a Montefalco per cucinare insieme a Giorgione tra ricette e aneddoti divertenti.

programme.title: The best beker S.3
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: The best beker S.2
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Ritratto di chef
programme.desc: S5 - Lo chef è approdato a Palermo dopo varie esperienze in giro per il mondo. La scelta dell'Italia non è stata causale: nelle sue vene scorre sangue italiano, veneto per la precisione

programme.title: Ritratto di chef
programme.desc: S5 - Lo chef è approdato a Palermo dopo varie esperienze in giro per il mondo. La scelta dell'Italia non è stata causale: nelle sue vene scorre sangue italiano, veneto per la precisione

programme.title: 4 chiacchiere S2
programme.desc: Dolomiti - Dal mare alle montagne, le Dolomiti, tetto del Friuli Venezia Giulia, uno spettacolo emozionante e suggestivo che Fabrizio esplora con Terry Giacomello,

programme.title: Viaggi di spirito Puglia
programme.desc: Bisceglie - Un amico storico, una terra ospitale come quella pugliese, un bar. Un gruppo di amici alla scoperta dei distillati e del gin. Tutto questo e altro nel viaggio di Julian in Puglia

programme.title: Spirit contro tutti
programme.desc: Per Massimo non esistono sfide complicate, abbinamenti improbabili o missioni impossibili. Ma quando hai come sfidante Max Mariola, tutto diventa improvvisamente difficile.

programme.title: Spirit contro tutti
programme.desc: Scontro fra Titani in questo episodio. Massimo sfida Giorgione con un cocktail da vero maestro, Giorgione risponde con dei totani ripieni degni del più laido e corrotto cuoco.

programme.title: Oltre il mare: Il mio viaggio in Toscana
programme.desc: Montalcino - Giuseppe Carrus continua il suo viaggio questa volta alla scoperta delle cantine più importanti e rappresentative della Toscana. Tra colline e vigneti uno sguardo appassionato verso le realtà vitivinicole di questa regione.

programme.title: Cosi' lontani cosi' vicini S.1
programme.desc: Max, italiano doc, e Mai, giapponese doc, ci faranno vedere come alcune ricette italiane e a altre ricette giapponesi non sono poi così lontane.

programme.title: Giorgione a grande richiesta
programme.desc: Le ricette dei Giorgione su richiesta. Lasagne, parmigiana, carbonara o amatriciana. Tutte le ricette richieste dai suoi fans.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi e Giorgione
programme.desc: Giorgione in trasferta. La famiglia Bicocchi al completo invita Giorgione a San Giovanni Persiceto per trascorrere qualche giorno in compagnia di ricette tradizionali, laide, corrotte e test

programme.title: The best beker S.3
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: The best beker S.2
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: Il dolce sale
programme.desc: Stefano Laghi, Sebastiano Caridi e Luca Montersino. Il mondo della pasticceria si incontra in cucina per dare vita a ricette di pasticceria dolce e salata.

programme.title: 4 chiacchiere S2
programme.desc: Trieste - Una porta che si apre sull’Europa, questa è Trieste. Mille facce e mille racconti. Qui Fabrizio incontra Max Sganga e tutto quel che la citta' offre

programme.title: Parola di chef S11
programme.desc: Enzo Piedimonte - Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Ciro a mamma'

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing meal based on childhood memories! Josh makes pan con tomate, Bolognese, and strawberry ice cream, while Erica prepares paella, churros, and sangria!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing game day menu! Josh makes PB&J caramel corn, chicken tenders, and an Arnold Palmer, while Erica prepares crab fries, burger-themed egg rolls, and a classic Pittsburgh sandwich!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dinner! Josh makes risotto negro, cauliflower bravas, and grilled flank steak while Erica prepares oysters, a veggie board, and braised chicken!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing bar bites! Josh makes fried halloumi, whitefish tartar, and a salad based on a drink, while Erica prepares beef tartare, escargot, and sliders!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing meal inspired by fire and ice! Josh makes arctic char crudo, duck breast, and a smores dessert, while Erica prepares sea bass crudo and fish curry!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing international menu! Josh makes dishes from Thailand while Erica prepares a South Korean meal!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the spookiest Halloween meal! Josh makes pumpkin curry. crispy chicken feet. and calf liver. while Erica pumpkin shaped gnocchi. witch hat shaped pasta. and bruschetta with mushroom skulls!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing stuffed dishes! Josh makes a burger stuffed with foie gras and brie while Erica stuffs a zucchini with lamb!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the best fusion menu combining northern and southern inspirations! Josh brings together Canada and Vietnam, while Erica mashes up Canada and Mexico!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik flash back to the 1990s and 1960s to see who can come up with the best retro menu! Josh makes ravioli in a can, stuffed crust, and dunking cookies, while Erica channels Julia Child with coq au vin and duck a l’orange!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing Sunday dinner! Josh makes roast chicken with herbs de Provence, while Erica prepares two kinds of pasta!

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Brazil-born Iafa Almeida Cac that she has roots from other places. Alongside an expert chef, Iafa cooks a recipe that blends fresh ingredients from her Brazilian and newfound culture.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards takes PJ Kerr on a journey to discover his ancestry and meets with an expert chef to learn more about his newfound roots.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Bianca Osbourne is shocked by host Tyrone Edwards who reveals a whole new side of her family history.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: After revealing his DNA results, host Tyrone Edwards accompanies Jacob Ahee on a journey of self-discovery as he explores his newfound roots through food.

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Korea - Jicama Kimchi, Russia - Roasted Eggplant Salad, Spain - Quinoa Paella, and El Salvador - Salvadorian Grilled Iceberg Lettuce Wedge!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Indonesia - Tomato Nasi Goreng, Greece - Greek Melon Salad, Syria - Kidney Bean Hummus, and Thailand - Coconut Curry Cabbage Rolls!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Sweden - Swedish Turnips and Granola, Mexico - Radicchio Tacos, Senegal - Cashew-Sweeth Potato Maafe, and Italy - Bok Choy Fusili!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Africa - Braaied Rapini, Iceland - Cold Icelandic Pepper Soup, Bangladesh - Edamame Jhalmuri, and Spain - Spanish Broccoli Tortilla!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Filled with ruins in its bustling streets, the region of Lazio sticks with grandeur in all it does, including food! To introduce us to Lazio, Host Michael Bonacini highlights its Jewish influence with a crispy Roman Jewish-style Artichokes. As crunchy as a potato chip, Michael's artichokes are a delicious fried treat that are a perfect way to kick off a delicious meal. For his primo Michael brings together simple ingredients to create a rich Bucatini with Amatriciana Sauce. Michael's secondo turns what was once peasant food into a delectable and tender dish. Cooked with a blend of vegetables and sauce, Michael's Braised Oxtail brings forth the history of cuisine. Returning to Rome for his...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Campania's beautiful coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood. Diving into the culture of the region, Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri. Putting a twist on the classic dish, Michael's Grilled Caprese Salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil. For his primo, Michael serves up bold flavours with his Spaghetti Puttanesca. Mixing salty and sweet, this sauce offers a delicious take on the typical plate of spaghetti. Looking to the coast for his secondo, Michael quickly cooks up aromatic and spicy Herb-stuffed Scallops and Grilled Broccoli Rabe. For his dolce Michael whips up a dessert...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini delves into the Italian region of Emilia- Romagna to discover its iconic cuisine. To start, Michael stays light with an airy Mortadella Mousse spread on fluffy Modena Mini Flatbreads. Next, Michael cooks up Tortellini in Broth, a dish originally from Bologna that can be easily altered to personal taste. Michael chooses to fill his tortellini with a rich and savoury mixture of prosciutto, mortadella, and ground pork. For his secondo, Michael uses traditional ingredients and pairs them in a tart, luxurious dish of Duck Breast with Balsamic Cherry Sauce. To wind down his meal, Michael whips up a creamy classic, Rice Custard Cake topped with a Cherry Glaze.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini explores sweet and spicy dishes hailing from the coastal region of Calabria. For his antipasto, Michael cooks up a light and refreshing Brioche with Gelato. Fluffy brioche buns surround the sweet flavours of gelato for a delicious start to your meal. Switching to spice for the primo, Michael introduces a Spicy Sausage and Ricotta Pasta. Full of sweet, savoury, and spicy flavours, this dish provides a strong, flavourful meal sure to please any crowd. For his secondo, Michael goes for a hearty Lamb au Gratin with Peas and Asparagus; a classic holiday dish that will warm any room. For his finale, Michael whips up a simple, yet impressive, Chocolate-covered Figs.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Jesse Magallanes was raised in an Argentinian household, but he knows there's more to his ancestry. Host Tyrone Edwards reveals the results of his DNA test and Jesse begins his journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Chelsea Richards comes from a Jamaican family but suspects there is more to her ancestry. Host Tyrone Edwards gives her the shock of her life when he reveals the results of her DNA test.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals the exciting results of Carmen Araiza's DNA test. She embarks on a journey of self-discovery, learning about her newfound culture through cooking.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Adopted Tara Broadbent is shocked by the results of her DNA test and learns more about her biological ancestry through food.

programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by the USA - Scalloped Cassava Casserole, Vietnam - Pear Summer Rolls, Spain - Hempseed Romesco with Leeks, and India - Potato Biryani Hash!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Full of luxurious treats, the northern Italian region of Lombardy offers rich and delicious cuisine. For his antipasto, celebrity chef Michael Bonacini prepares a delicate dish of Stuffed Squash Blossoms. Soft and light, these blossoms are enhanced with a creamy filling of parmesan, anchovies, and nutmeg. Following the fresh taste of flowers, Michael cooks up an impressive and rich Risotto Milanese. A feast for your eyes and taste buds, this risotto is coloured by saffron and its floral strands release flavour and colour as it's cooked. programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Known for its lush landscape, Umbria is a region of that offers fresh, seasonal ingredients perfect for simple yet boldly flavoured cuisine. To begin his Umbrian feast, Chef Michael Bonacini serves up a sweet and spicy antipasto of Fried Spicy Tomato Flatbread. Seasoned with chili peppers for that bit of heat, Michael's antipasto is a humble yet satisfying snack. For his primo, Michael brings our attention to an Umbrian specialty: truffles! Prepared with light and fluffy pasta, Michael's Gnocchi with Black Truffle concentrates the decadent flavour of the truffle in the pillowy pasta to create a rich and delectable dish. Paying homage to the plights of farmers and fisherman, Michael's...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Appreciating island culture, host Michael Bonacini explores the enchanting region of Sardegna and its exceptional cuisine. Michael begins his island feast with a taste of the sea through his seasoned antipasto of Stuffed Snails. Next, Michael prepares a luxurious and delicate Lobster Spaghetti, highlighting the fresh seafood of the region. Moving inland for his secondo, Michael cooks up a traditional dish of Lamb with Artichokes and Saffron, a meal that combines three of Sardegna's most famous ingredients. To end his meal, Michael combines salty and sweet with a dolce of Honey and Cheese Fritters.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: One of Italy's quieter regions, Friuli Venezia Guilia offers iconic decadent dishes, waiting to be discovered. Renowned chef Michael Bonacini begins his exploration of the region with his take on a traditional meal: Cheese Crisp Baskets with Polenta and Mushrooms. This savoury antipasto is an elegant looking dish with humble flavours. For his primo, Michael prepares a unique Poppy Seed, Sage, and Prosciutto Pasta, a dish that is a twist on traditional pasta. programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: Sinj

programme.title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic

She visits iconic landmarks like the Duomo, Uffizi Gallery, and Ponte Vecchio, uncovering the city’s artistic legacy. Along the way, she enjoys Tuscan classics like Bistecca alla Fiorentina and the delicious schiaccata panino.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The spotlight falls on two traditional Cypriot favorites. First, we explore the art of preparing Oven Lamb Kleftiko, a slow-cooked dish where tender lamb is infused with herbs and baked to perfection, capturing the essence of village cooking. Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.desc: Lebanon, where the Mediterranean coast meets mountains steeped in history. From the vibrant streets of Beirut to ancient ruins and seaside villages, Lebanon reveals a rich mix of culture, cuisine, and traditions that showcase its unique Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Andalucia
programme.desc: Join Angelica Malini on an unforgettable journey through Andalucía, southern Spain’s most colorful and captivating region, as they explore Cordoba and Cadiz. Famous for flamenco, tapas, and stunning Moorish architecture, Andalucía’s rich history comes alive here. In Cordoba, the host marvels at the breathtaking Mezquita, a grand mosque turned cathedral. In Cadiz, an ancient Phoenician city, they soak in sweeping Atlantic views and a corniche with hints of North Africa. This episode immerses viewers in the culture, history, and vibrant spirit of one of Spain’s most enchanting regions.

programme.title: Azzurro Storie di mare: Alla scoperta di Ischia, isola verde
programme.desc: A journey along Italy’s coast, from Ponza to Calabria, exploring its natural beauty and the people who protect it. Fishermen, divers, and activists share their passion for the sea and their fight against pollution.

programme.title: Tourism a wistful bizerte
programme.desc: Discover Bizerte’s sustainable tourism through the artistry of Berber pottery, handcrafted by local women. This initiative not only preserves centuries-old traditions but also empowers communities with vital income, all within the breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural tapestry of the region.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slowing down to savor Burgundy's historic, scenic, and edible delights, we revel in the rich traditions of this serene region, where nature is as sophisticated as the people.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Zeus and the Conquest of Power begins with the overthrow of his father, Cronus, who devoured his children to prevent a prophecy. Hidden at birth, Zeus grows strong and returns to free his siblings from Cronus’s belly. Together, they wage a mighty war against the Titans, emerging victorious. Zeus claims the throne of Olympus, marking the rise of the Olympian gods and the triumph of order over chaos.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: CONCERTO - Federico Fellini 100
programme.desc: From the Rai Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Marcello Rota and featuring soprano Cristina Mosca, celebrates 100 years since the birth of Fellini. The concert features iconic soundtracks composed by Nino Rota for Fellini's films, including La Strada, Prova d'orchestra, and Satyricon.

programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Carnival Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Step into a world of color, music, and masks as the Mediterranean celebrates its iconic carnivals. Malta’s Karnival Malta lights up the streets with parades and flamboyant costumes. In Slovenia, the Carnival in Cerknica keeps centuries-old traditions alive, and Italy’s legendary Venice Carnival mesmerizes with elegance and historic pageantry. This is celebration at its most spectacular.

programme.title: Med Minds 08 Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal, the daring general of the Mediterranean, defied empires with bold strategy and unshakable resolve.

programme.title: Med Nations 12 Lebanon
programme.desc: Lebanon, where the Mediterranean coast meets mountains steeped in history. From the vibrant streets of Beirut to ancient ruins and seaside villages, Lebanon reveals a rich mix of culture, cuisine, and traditions that showcase its unique Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Milan
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Milan, in northern Italy’s Lombardy region. Known for its chic style, stunning architecture, delicious food, and world-class art, Milan stands out as one of Europe’s most fashionable and sophisticated cities.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Just south of Naples, we'll experience the breathtaking Amalfi Coast, including trendy Positano, the limoncello charms of Sorrento, the ancient Greek temples at Paestum, and the Blue Grotto hidden beneath the enchanting Isle of Capri.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The flavors of land and sea are brought together in the kitchen, with prawn linguine, a light and savory pasta dish brimming with fresh Mediterranean seafood. For dessert, galaktompoureko, a traditional Greek custard-filled pastry with golden, crispy layers, provides a sweet and indulgent finale. An episode celebrating the best of classic Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature Ep 5
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Culture and Celebration
programme.desc: Malta’s event scene brings together style, sound, and large-scale spectacle, from the industry showcase of the Malta Trade Fair to the international flair of Malta Fashion Week. Music takes centre stage at the Malta Jazz Festival and the global pop event Isle of MTV, highlighting the islands’ position as a vibrant hub for culture and live entertainment in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Jump into the heart of home cooking with traditional Cypriot dishes. Orange pie, a sweet and fragrant dessert that perfectly rounds out the meal, is served after lentils with orzo, a filling and cosy Mediterranean dish. A delightful blend of traditional treats and nourishing flavours.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: Med Minds 05 Plato
programme.desc: Plato, the philosopher of Athens, questioned life, truth, and society, leaving ideas that still shape the world.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Azzurro Storie di mare: Alla scoperta di Ischia, isola verde
programme.desc: A journey along Italy’s coast, from Ponza to Calabria, exploring its natural beauty and the people who protect it. Fishermen, divers, and activists share their passion for the sea and their fight against pollution.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music! From Malta’s high-energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy’s cutting-edge Limbo Festival, Spain’s forward-thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey’s classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Tradition meets comfort with a flavourful meatloaf enriched with halloumi and sun-dried tomatoes, a Mediterranean twist on a classic. programme.title: Med Destinations Delos

programme.title: Imotska krajina
programme.desc: Imotski, known for its stunning Red and Blue Lakes, draws nature lovers and active travelers alike. During a local marenda break, host Jurica Grbavac introduced us to regional flavors—pivca and pura, a true taste of Imotski tradition.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Through adventures such as parasailing at Kavaratti and scuba diving at Bangaram, Alex discovers the beauty of Lakshadweep’s coral islands.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: Scaling rocks and defying heights, Milagros finds herself suspended 1200 feet above the ground at the Sacred Valley of the Incas.

programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Xplore
